title: centaurea spina-badia subsp. hanryi
intro: Centaurea spina-badia subsp. hanryi, also known as the Spiny Knapweed, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its thistle-like appearance and spiny leaves. The medicinal properties of Centaurea spina-badia subsp. hanryi lie in its ability to inhibit inflammation, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat digestive issues, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from joint pain and swelling. Centaurea spina-badia subsp. hanryi is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
